productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock branch-aware confirmation beat
lastRefinementUnit.result: Stormlock now holds its secured result for 24 deterministic route frames before the original payoff opens, preserving readable zero-pressure or protected-catch feedback through existing route-choice, HUD, target, beam, and event owners.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Stormlock branch-confirmation feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: Both branch results now remain visible for 24 authored frames at Stormlock before the existing Slipstream or Cacheline payoff event opens, with action input suppressed only during that bounded beat.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All 28 existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, affected JavaScript syntax checks, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed safe and shortcut routes through the exact confirmation boundary into their original 134-speed and 175-cargo score contracts; proved one delayed payoff event, real failure and keyboard retry, closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, bounded DOM/canvas/descriptor/scene/heap behavior, and zero console messages. Human View passed the first screen plus safe and shortcut confirmations with diagnostics closed. Matched isolated active-play performance improved from 28.76 to 29.29 FPS, p95 held at 51.8 ms, and steady-state counts did not grow.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Experiments production and publication-receipt commits published to resolved default branch main after fetch-before-push verification; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Animate the existing Stormlock consequence line into the selected Slipstream or Cacheline target as confirmation ends, so the branch handoff reads before the next swing without adding a line, target, or state owner.
